name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
description: Google's current flagship reasoning model with 77.1% ARC-AGI-2 (2.5x Gemini 3 Pro), 94.3% GPQA Diamond, 2887 Elo on LiveCodeBench Pro, and 1M token context. Supersedes the retired Gemini 3 Pro Preview (shut down 2026-03-09; the gemini-pro-latest alias now points here). Note: still served under the preview model ID gemini-3.1-pro-preview — official docs do not list it as GA, contrary to earlier reports. Gemini 3.5 Pro (announced I/O May 2026) has not shipped as of 2026-07-09.

evidence.value: 2887 Elo on competitive coding (frontier-leading at launch)
78.2% on multi-tool agentic orchestration

task_accuracy_code.methodology: Competitive programming and agentic tool-use benchmarks from official launch materials

evidence.value: 77.1% (vs 31.1% standard Gemini 3 Pro, ~2.5x generational gain)
94.3% on PhD-level science questions

task_accuracy_reasoning.methodology: Abstract reasoning and PhD-level science benchmarks reported at launch

evidence.value: Positioned as flagship Pro tier, superseding Gemini 3 Pro Preview across general benchmarks

task_accuracy_general.methodology: Cross-benchmark comparison against predecessor Gemini 3 Pro Preview

evidence.value: Stable flagship serving since 2026-02-19, though the model ID remains gemini-3.1-pro-preview

output_consistency.methodology: Consistency assessment based on serving track record and documented model behavior

evidence.value: Typical response time under 2s for standard prompts; deep reasoning modes slower

latency_p50.methodology: Median latency from third-party aggregator measurements

evidence.value: 1M token context window at launch
99.9% uptime (last 90 days, Vertex AI)

uptime.methodology: Historical uptime data from official status page

performance_reliability.notes: Massive reasoning jump: 77.1% ARC-AGI-2 vs 31.1% for Gemini 3 Pro. Correction 2026-07-09: official docs list the model as gemini-3.1-pro-preview (preview, not GA), contrary to the earlier GA characterization; it is nonetheless Google's designated migration target for retired/deprecated Pro models. Gemini 3.5 Pro (announced I/O May 2026, June GA target slipped) has still not shipped as of 2026-07-09.

evidence.value: Hardened prompt injection defenses carried forward from Gemini 3 line

prompt_injection_resistance.methodology: OWASP LLM01 prompt injection testing and vendor safety documentation review

evidence.value: Improved adversarial robustness reported at GA
Paid-tier API data not used for training

data_leakage_prevention.methodology: Privacy policy and API terms review

evidence.value: Configurable multi-category safety filters

output_safety.methodology: Safety filter testing across harmful content categories

evidence.value: Google Cloud security standards, IAM integration on Vertex AI

api_security.methodology: Review of API security features and infrastructure

security.notes: Inherits Google Cloud security posture. Configurable safety filters and Vertex AI IAM controls for enterprise deployment.

data_residency.value: Multi-region including EU residency options (Vertex AI)

evidence.value: EU data residency options available via Vertex AI regions

data_residency.methodology: Cloud infrastructure and data residency documentation review

evidence.value: Paid API data not used for training; Vertex AI data governance applies

data_retention.value: Varies by tier; zero retention available on Vertex AI enterprise

evidence.value: Enterprise zero-retention configurations available
Customer responsible for PII redaction; Cloud DLP integration available
SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001/27017/27018, GDPR, HIPAA (via Google Cloud)

compliance_certifications.methodology: Certification verification through Google Cloud compliance center

evidence.value: Zero-retention configuration available for enterprise Vertex AI customers

privacy_compliance.notes: Strong enterprise posture via Vertex AI data governance, SOC/ISO certifications, and EU data residency options.

evidence.value: Thinking traces and configurable reasoning depth exposed via API
Improved factual grounding over Gemini 3 Pro Preview

hallucination_rate.methodology: Factual QA testing and vendor claims review

evidence.value: Regular bias testing and mitigation per AI Principles

bias_fairness.methodology: Bias benchmark evaluation and policy review

evidence.value: Expresses uncertainty appropriately in extended reasoning mode
Comprehensive launch documentation with benchmarks and limitations
General training description provided; detailed sources not disclosed
Configurable multi-category safety guardrails

trust_transparency.notes: Strong transparency via exposed thinking traces and comprehensive documentation. Training data details remain limited (industry standard).

evidence.value: RESTful API with streaming, function calling, multimodal, thinking control

api_design_quality.methodology: API design and feature completeness review

evidence.value: Unified Gen AI SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, Java; actively maintained
Released 2026-02-19 with documented deprecation timeline for 3 Pro Preview

gemini-3.1-pro-preview active with no shutdown date; designated replacement for gemini-3-pro-preview (shut down 2026-03-09) and gemini-2.5-pro (shutdown 2026-10-16); gemini-pro-latest alias points here since 2026-03-06
Comprehensive Cloud Console and Vertex AI monitoring
Enterprise support tiers with SLAs
Day-one availability across Gemini app, AI Studio, Vertex AI
Standard commercial terms; enterprise agreements available
Official: $2.00 input / $12.00 output per 1M tokens at <=200K context; $4.00/$18.00 above 200K; context caching $0.20-$0.40 plus $4.50/hour storage; paid tier only (no free tier)

pricing_transparency.methodology: Verified against the official Gemini API pricing page

operational_excellence.notes: Mature operational posture across all Google AI surfaces since 2026-02-19 launch. Pricing confirmed on the official pricing page (2026-07-09). Model ID remains gemini-3.1-pro-preview despite flagship positioning.

code-generation.notes: 2887 Elo LiveCodeBench Pro and 78.2% MCP Atlas. Strong agentic coding; 1M context covers full codebases.

data-analysis.notes: 1M context plus top-tier reasoning makes it excellent for massive dataset analysis.

research-assistant.notes: 94.3% GPQA Diamond and 1M context. Best-in-class for deep multi-document research.

legal-compliance.notes: 1M context for full contract corpora. EU data residency and Vertex AI governance support regulated workloads.

financial-analysis.notes: Frontier quantitative reasoning with long context for large filing sets.

education.notes: Exceptional reasoning depth for tutoring; thinking traces aid pedagogical explanations.

content-creation.notes: Strong long-form generation; reasoning depth helps structured technical content.

healthcare.notes: HIPAA via Google Cloud. Strong reasoning for clinical literature, but use Vertex AI governance controls.

strengths: Exceptional abstract reasoning: 77.1% ARC-AGI-2 (~2.5x Gemini 3 Pro's 31.1%)
Frontier coding: 2887 Elo LiveCodeBench Pro, 78.2% MCP Atlas
1M token context window; Google's designated migration target for the retired 3 Pro Preview and deprecated 2.5 Pro
Enterprise posture: Vertex AI data governance, SOC/ISO certs, EU residency
Day-one availability across AI Studio, Vertex AI, and Gemini app
limitations: Still served under a preview model ID (gemini-3.1-pro-preview); not listed as GA in official docs
Paid tier only — no free tier access (unique among current Gemini API models)
Extended reasoning modes add significant latency
Gemini 3.5 Pro (announced I/O May 2026, GA target slipped past June) may supersede it soon
Long-context (>200K) pricing roughly doubles per-token cost
best_for: Long-context applications over entire codebases or document corpora
Enterprises on Google Cloud needing data governance and EU residency
Agentic systems requiring strong multi-tool orchestration

pricing.notes: Confirmed on the official Gemini API pricing page 2026-07-09. Context caching $0.20-$0.40 per 1M plus $4.50/hour storage. Paid tier only (no free tier). Same pricing as the retired Gemini 3 Pro.

metadata.architecture: Multimodal transformer with configurable extended reasoning
